item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 3min ROTTERDAM AWAITS
The darts returns to the Netherlands
Night Eleven of the Premier League sees Gian van Veen and Michael van Gerwen play on home soil 1 2 13 955

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 3min 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗱𝘆 𝘁𝗼 𝗴𝗼 𝗶𝗻 𝗥𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗱𝗮𝗺
